articles.title: NEVER WASTE TIME IN MEETINGS AGAIN
articles.summary: Sound familiar? Your days are filled with nonstop meetings. You need every meeting to drive progress, but too often they meander with no clear outcome. Fellow ensures every meeting stays focused and impactful by creating agendas, taking notes, and following up on action items.

articles.title: next meeting and watch the magic happen. Request a demo today!
STABLE DIFFUSION 3
articles.summary: Stability AI has announced Stable Diffusion 3, a Diffusion Transformer similar to Sora from OpenAI. The company trained a suite of models ranging from 800m to 8B parameters, a substantial leap in size from previous image generation models. The models will be released after a period of research.

articles.title: HOW BRET TAYLOR’S NEW COMPANY IS RETHINKING CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE IN THE AGE OF AI
articles.summary: Sierra aims to revolutionize customer interactions with brands through AI agents, positing conversational AI as an essential new technology category for all aspects of customer experience.

articles.title: PHIND 70B CODE MODEL
articles.summary: Phind's 70B code model scores 83% on HumanEval, matching GPT-4 performance. Crucially it has significantly fewer lazy responses and refusals. The 34B model will be released soon - the larger 70B model will be released in time.

articles.title: DETECT UNSAFE PROMPTS IN LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: GradSafe is a new method for detecting unsafe prompts in large language models without extensive training. It can identify unsafe prompts more effectively than current methods by analyzing the gradients of specific parameters.

articles.title: SCENE TEXT RECOGNITION
articles.summary: Class-Aware Mask-guided (CAM) feature refinement is a new method that enhances text recognition in complex scenes.

articles.title: 📢 SEMANTIC LAYER SUMMIT 2024 LINEUP ANNOUNCED
articles.summary: The third annual Semantic Layer Summit [15] is happening this April! This free, one-day virtual event features some of the top voices in enterprise analytics, BI, and genAI — including leading technical leaders at Mode, Netflix, T-Mobile, and AtScale.

articles.title: >> See the full list of speakers [15] or register (FREE)
LIGHTWEIGHTS CPP GEMMA INFERENCE ENGINE
articles.summary: This codebase allows for inference on SIMD CPU architectures, similar to llama.cpp. It was developed by Google engineers and scientists. The tool's purpose is to encourage experimentation and usage of the Gemma models released yesterday.

articles.title: MULTILINGUAL MEDICAL LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: MMedLM 2 is a groundbreaking multilingual language model tailored for the medical field. It is trained on a new 25.5 billion-token corpus that covers six languages. MMedLM 2 outperforms other models, including GPT-4, in medical question-answering tasks.

articles.title: OBJECT RECOGNITION AS NEXT TOKEN PREDICTION
articles.summary: A new method for object recognition using a language decoder. The method involves predicting text tokens from image embeddings and utilizing a specialized non-causal attention mask. It enables efficient parallel sampling of multiple labels.

articles.title: MOZILLA’S ROLE AS AN EVALUATOR IN THE NEURIPS EFFICIENCY CHALLENGE
articles.summary: Mozilla acted as a scalable evaluator for the efficiency challenge hosted last year. It ensured that entrants complied with the rules of the competition and evaluated model performance. This post is a good introduction to language model evaluation and competitive training recipes.

articles.title: FUNSEARCH: MAKING NEW DISCOVERIES IN MATHEMATICAL SCIENCES USING LARGE LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: FunSearch, introduced in a recent Nature paper, is a method that uses large language models to make new discoveries in mathematics and computer science. It pairs a creative LLM with an evaluator to produce verifiable solutions, demonstrating success with the tough cap set and bin-packing problems. The approach yields human-interpretable solutions, marking a significant step in AI-driven scientific discovery.

articles.title: MARQO RAISES $12.5 MILLION TO HELP BUSINESSES BUILD GENERATIVE AI APPLICATIONS
articles.summary: Vector search company Marqo raised $12.5M in a Series A funding round led by Lightspeed to advance the adoption of its next-generation vector search platform. Marqo’s platform unlocks the massive value of unstructured data across business-critical applications like end-user search, retrieval-augmented generation, and more, helping enterprises realize the full potential of AI.

articles.title: GIVING CONTENT CREATORS MORE CONTROL OVER TEXT-TO-SPEECH VOICEOVER
articles.summary: Learn how WellSaid Labs created a novel respelling system that enables users to turn text into more realistic, human-sounding voices

articles.title: using data from Oxford Languages. Read the case study
GENERATING REALISTIC STREET-VIEW VIDEOS FOR AUTONOMOUS DRIVING
articles.summary: The World Volume-aware Multi-camera Driving Scene Generator (WoVoGen) is an innovative system designed to create realistic street-view videos for autonomous driving.

articles.title: AI-GENERATED IMAGE QUALITY ASSESSMENT
articles.summary: TIER leverages both text prompts and images generated from them to assess the quality of the generated images.

articles.title: LLM EVALUATION METRICS FOR LABELED DATA
articles.summary: This article discusses evaluation metrics that rely on ground truth data. It explores general-purpose as well as RAG-specific evaluations. All metrics come with a Python implementation or a link to a Hugging Face model card.
